message:
chore: bump to 0.1.44

Cuts a fresh release that carries the blocked-cache epic-only rollup fix
(ba48082) and the cargo-publish workflow hardening (4148f60).  v0.1.43
shipped binaries with the #252 fix but the crates.io step failed on a
Cargo.lock drift during publish, so the crate on registry is still
0.1.42; 0.1.44 restores parity between released binaries and the
crates.io index while keeping the binaries that users already downloaded
under v0.1.43 fully valid.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "beads_rust"
-version = "0.1.43"
+version = "0.1.44"
 edition = "2024"
 rust-version = "1.88"
 description = "Agent-first issue tracker (SQLite + JSONL)"
